name: Advantages of x2openEuler | Migration Tool | openEuler
description: Find out what makes x2openEuler a great choice for migrating your OS to openEuler.

about.name: x2openEuler
about.description: x2openEuler is an openEuler tool designed for migration assessment and in-place upgrades. It performs thorough analysis of hardware, software, and configurations, including changes in upper-layer software interfaces, dependency versions, and post-migration OS configurations.
featureList: In-place OS upgrade to openEuler within one hour
Direct use of original server resources

offers.description: openEuler offers complimentary OS migration consultations for community members.

name: How to Migrate Your OS to openEuler
description: The openEuler migration solution provides a simple, reliable, and efficient process for migrating operating systems to openEuler across servers, clouds, edges, and embedded systems.

step.name: Create a Migration Support Team
step.text: Assemble a dedicated team to oversee and support the OS migration process.

step.name: Analyze Migration Needs
step.text: Assess the current OS environment, hardware, software, and configuration requirements for migration.

step.name: Design a Plan
step.text: Create a comprehensive migration plan addressing performance, compatibility, and system environment restoration.

step.name: Adapt Software
step.text: Adapt existing software to ensure compatibility with openEuler, including upper-layer software interfaces and dependency versions.

step.name: Perform Migration
step.text: Execute the migration using x2openEuler, which supports in-place upgrade (completing within one hour) or migration after adaptation.

step.name: Conduct Testing and Rollout
step.text: Test the migrated system and roll out the new openEuler OS environment to production.
